text.title: Speech-to-Text Basics Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure for a Whisper transcription pipeline.

step.name: pick-provider
step.action: Volume ≤10k hr/month and no privacy ban → OpenAI API. Else → local faster-whisper on GPU.

step.name: format-guard
step.action: Reject if extension not in {mp3, mp4, mpeg, mpga, m4a, wav, webm}.
step.decision-gate: If FLAC/OGG/AAC → convert upstream or reject.

step.name: split-if-large
step.action: If >25 MB → pydub split on silence into chunks ≤22 MB. Preserve segment ordering.

step.name: transcribe
step.action: Call Whisper API (or local faster-whisper) with language= + response_format="verbose_json" + timestamp_granularities=["segment"].

step.name: merge
step.action: Shift each segment's start/end by the chunk offset; concatenate; emit a single verbose_json.

step.name: post-process
step.action: Store transcript next to audio; emit (audio_uri, transcript_uri, language, provider, cost_usd) to audit.
